concepts.name: frame
concepts.description: A structured representation of a concept, object, or situation, with slots and fillers.

concepts.name: slot
concepts.description: An attribute of a frame, which can hold values (fillers).

concepts.name: value
concepts.description: A filler for a slot in a frame.

concepts.name: frameNetwork
concepts.description: A network of interconnected frames, linked through slot-filler relations.

concepts.name: perceptualData
concepts.description: Raw unstructured input, such as text or visual data.

concepts.name: image
concepts.description: Visual input representing structured percepts, such as an RPM cell.

concepts.name: newsStory
concepts.description: Structured representation of a news story with slots for event attributes.

relations.name: hasSlot
relations.description: Indicates that a frame contains a slot.

relations.name: hasValue
relations.description: Indicates that a slot in a frame is filled with a value.

relations.name: inheritsFrom
relations.description: Indicates that one frame inherits slots and values from another frame.

relations.name: inside
relations.description: True if one shape is inside another.

relations.name: above
relations.description: True if one shape is vertically above another.
